SELECT base64Encode(CONCAT(plaintext, ' is great!')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT base64Encode((SELECT plaintext FROM test_strings LIMIT 1)) AS encoded_string;
CREATE TABLE test_strings_2 (id UInt32, plaintext String);
SELECT t1.id, base64Encode(t1.plaintext) AS encoded FROM test_strings_2 t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT base64Encode((SELECT plaintext FROM test_strings ORDER BY length(plaintext) DESC LIMIT 1)) AS longest_encoded;
SELECT base64Encode(plaintext) FROM (SELECT plaintext FROM test_strings LIMIT 5) AS subquery;
SELECT base64Encode(CONCAT(t1.plaintext, ' ', t2.plaintext)) FROM test_strings t1 CROSS JOIN test_strings t2;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id UInt32, data String);
SELECT id, base64Encode(data) FROM complex_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM complex_test WHERE id > 1);
SELECT DISTINCT base64Encode(plaintext) FROM test_strings WHERE plaintext IS NOT NULL;
